constraints.order: chronological; item index defines the unit number used by phase/milestone resolvers

constraints.collision: labels are nowrap; more than 4 milestones collide on the lane

at.description: fractional unit position on the timeAxis (e.g. 1 = end of unit 1, 3 = end of unit 3). Resolver converts it to the diamond's left% and emits the matching dashed connector inside .vlines

constraints.order: execution sequence; renderer supplies ordinal chrome

ordinal.description: derived from item index (01, 02, …); resolver writes .phase .n — never authored

kind.description: work = solid teal bar; continuous = dashed outline bar (.bar.cont)

startUnit.description: first timeAxis unit the phase occupies (1-based); resolver converts start/end to the bar's left% and width%

endUnit.description: last timeAxis unit the phase occupies (1-based, inclusive); must be >= startUnit and <= timeAxis length

barLabel.description: clipped by the bar (nowrap + overflow hidden); omit on bars narrower than 2 units

presentation.composition: one month axis + one milestone lane + 3–5 phase bars over a shared track; legend is fixed chrome
presentation.schedulePolicy: phase spans and milestone positions are computed from unit indexes, never hand-placed; a milestone must land on a real unit boundary of the declared timeAxis
